answer: Repeat thyroid function tests after 4 weeks
title: Management of Thyroid Dysfunction Before and During Pregnancy

items.question: Which of the following should be advised for a 38-year-old woman with a history of 2 first-trimester miscarriages, no notable medical history, and clinically euthyroid but with elevated TSH and TPO antibodies?
options: Repeat thyroid function tests after 4 weeks
